productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Light Blue Track Pant
description: CompositionLight blue PES soccer training plain weave pants in polyester, with short white strips along the sides and deep pocketWash careHand wash or machine washThis breathable Pro Evolution Soccer (PES) plain weave training pants designed by adidas for football training exercises and pre-match warm-ups ensures you move about comfortably. The elastic waist ensures it stays in place while you indulge in a heavy round of exercises or aim to win a challenging game. Three white stripes that run down from the waist to the knee in a step format, and a brand logo on the left leg add to your style statement. The deep pocket ensures ample space for your wallet, phone and other essentials. Pair this with short, slim Fit tees for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
